svg.title: Clutter estimation pipeline
svg.desc: Binary occupancy field passes through four resolution-normalised pooling stages. At each scale avg-pool yields f1 and f2, max-pool yields f3. The 12-dimensional feature vector is combined by weighted linear combination to yield clutter score C.
svg.text: 12-dimensional feature vector [ f₁ f₂ f₃ ] × 4 scales
Avg-pool derived — f₁ mean foreground density, f₂ spatial variance (irregularity)
Max-pool derived — f₃ fragmentation (fraction of occupied blocks)
Physical scale header — sensor-agnostic, block = ⌊ mm / mm_per_pixel ⌋
